title: Unit Type & Unit Lifecycle

classes.name: UnitType
key_fields: float speed, health, armor, hitSize, range, maxRange, mineRange, buildRange
float rotateSpeed, drag, accel, boostMultiplier, fallSpeed
boolean flying, canBoost, hovering, omniMovement, naval
boolean hittable, killable, targetable, logicControllable, playerControllable
boolean useUnitCap, allowedInPayloads, pickupUnits, physics, canDrown
int itemCapacity, ammoCapacity, mineTier, legCount, segments
key_methods: Unit spawn(Team team, float x, float y, float rotation, Cons<Unit> cons)
Unit spawn(Team team, float x, float y, float rotation)
Unit spawn(Team team, float x, float y)
void updatePayload(Unit unit, Unit unitHolder, Building buildingHolder)
classes.notes: create() calls constructor.get(), unit.setType(this), ability.created(unit), unit.heal(), sets elevation. spawn() calls create() then out.add(); handles multi-segment units recursively.

classes.name: Weapon
key_fields: float reload, x, y, shootX, shootY
boolean mirror, rotate, alternate, continuous, alwaysContinuous
boolean top, flipSprite, display, useAmmo, useAttackRange
key_methods: void shoot(Unit unit, WeaponMount mount, float shootX, float shootY, float rotation)
void bullet(Unit unit, WeaponMount mount, float xOffset, float yOffset, float angleOffset, Mover mover)
void handleBullet(Unit unit, WeaponMount mount, Bullet bullet)
Teamc findTarget(Unit unit, float x, float y, float range, boolean air, boolean ground)
boolean checkTarget(Unit unit, Teamc target, float x, float y, float range)
float bulletRotation(Unit unit, WeaponMount mount, float bulletX, float bulletY)
classes.notes: update() handles rotation, warmup, reload, continuous fire logic, then calls shoot(). shoot() uses ShootPattern.shoot() with delayed bullet scheduling. bullet() calls BulletType.create(). findTarget() delegates to Units.closestTarget().

classes.name: WeaponMount
key_fields: boolean shoot, rotate, side, charging, allowShootEffects
classes.notes: Pure state holder for runtime weapon state on a Unit. One WeaponMount per Weapon slot (Unit.mounts[]). Initialized with weapon.baseRotation.

classes.name: Ability
classes.notes: Abstract base for all unit abilities. Lifecycle hooks: init() on UnitType init, created() on unit spawn, update() each tick, death() on unit death. Data field is the only synced value.

inner_types: interface Sortf { float cost(Unit unit, float x, float y); }
classes.notes: canCreate() checks useUnitCap flag, team countType, getCap(), and isBanned(). Lifecycle @Remote methods are called over network (server→client). closestEnemy respects targetPriority field of UnitType.

relationships: UnitType creates UnitController (via Func<Unit, UnitController> controller)
UnitType references UnitType (segmentUnit, segmentEndUnit — self-referential for worm/crawler units)
Weapon composition WeaponMount (via Func<Weapon, WeaponMount> mountType, factory method)
Weapon depends_on BulletType (bullet field; creates Bullet entities)
Weapon depends_on Units (findTarget → Units.closestTarget; checkTarget → Units.invalidateTarget)
WeaponMount references Bullet (current bullet for continuous weapons)
Ability abstract_parent_of (many concrete subclasses in mindustry.entities.abilities.*)
Units depends_on UnitType (reads type.targetPriority, type.deathShake, type.useUnitCap)
Units depends_on Groups (Groups.unit spatial index queries)
lifecycle_flow: 1. DEFINITION: UnitType declared with weapons[], abilities[], constructor Prov<Unit>
2. INIT: UnitType.init() — resolves constructor via EntityMapping, calculates dpsEstimate, sets naval/canHeal flags, assigns pathCostId
3. SPAWN CHECK: Units.canCreate(team, type) → checks useUnitCap + getCap(team) + isBanned()
4. CREATION: UnitType.create(team) → constructor.get() → unit.setType(this) → ability.created(unit) → unit.ammo=ammoCapacity → unit.elevation=flying?1:0 → unit.heal()
5. SPAWNING: UnitType.spawn(...) → create(team) → unit.set(x,y) → unit.add() [adds to Groups/world]; for segmented units, spawns chain of segment units
6. NETWORK SYNC: Units.notifyUnitSpawn(unit) → Call.unitSpawn(UnitSyncContainer) on server
7. UPDATE TICK: UnitType.update(Unit) called; Ability.update(Unit) for each ability; Weapon.update(Unit, WeaponMount) for each mount
8. WEAPON FIRING: Weapon.update() → shoot() → ShootPattern.shoot() → bullet() → BulletType.create()
9. DEATH: unit.killed() → Units.unitDeath(uid) @Remote → unit.killed(); OR Units.unitCapDeath / unitEnvDeath / unitSafeDeath depending on cause
10. DESTROY: Units.unitDestroy(uid) @Remote → unit.destroy(); OR unit.remove() for despawn/safe death
important_notes: UnitType is the static blueprint; Unit is the runtime entity. UnitType.constructor is a Prov<Unit> resolved from EntityMapping by name.
Unit.mounts[] is a WeaponMount[] array, one per weapon (mirrored weapons produce 2 mounts). Weapon.mountType factory creates the WeaponMount instance.
Weapon.update() is called per-mount each game tick; it handles reload, warmup, rotation, targeting (autoTarget), and triggers shoot().
Abilities are cloned per-unit on creation (Ability.copy()); Ability.data is the only network-synced field.
Units (static utility) handles both targeting queries and lifecycle @Remote RPC calls for network multiplayer.
UnitType supports worm/crawler segmented units: segmentUnits>1 spawns a chain, each segment linked via Segmentc.addChild().
getCap() returns Integer.MAX_VALUE for wave team (in non-PvP/campaign), disableUnitCap, or ignoreUnitCap teams.
Weapon supports mirrored (mirror=true) and alternating (alternate=true) fire modes; otherSide index links the two mirrored mounts.
